summary: Built a duplicate-ready draft from the uploaded quotation and matched quotation evidence.
assumptions: Review quantities, units, and commercial values before sending.
Generated from the typed brief and any readable source files.
Used 2 similar quotation examples from the internal knowledge library.

draft_patch.subject: ASU 17TH GRADUATION CEREMONY 2024
exclusions: Permit and approvals for the organizing the event including any fees payable to government authorities where applicable.
Approvals and permissions from the venue for all temporary installations / structures, technical visits, and use of venue facilities for installation, event, and dismantling.
Pre-event and post-event working power supply on site for setup, operation, and dismantling works.
Main power supply and associated costs.
Security coverage for personnel and equipment from start of installation to completion of dismantling.
Cleaning, waste disposal, and maintenance during the event period.
Personnel and vehicle access passes for Pico personnel and designated subcontractors.
All risk public liability and event cancellation insurance, including materials and equipment on site.
Any cost payable to the venue.
Any scope of works not mentioned above.
terms: Validity: 10 days from the quotation date; subject to re-validation thereafter.
Order must be confirmed by contract at least 21 days prior to the event date.
Client to arrange venue, authorizations, utilities, and applicable fees for the duration of installation, event, and dismantling.
All audiovisual and other show equipment and structures are supplied on rental basis for the stated show duration only. Any extension is chargeable.
Rental items are subject to ex-stock availability at time of order confirmation. Pico may substitute equivalent stock where necessary.
Client to provide safe access, storage, and working conditions on site.
Any additional work or variation requested after confirmation will be charged separately.
Postponement or cancellation after confirmation may incur applicable cancellation or rescheduling charges.
Pico is not liable for damage caused by misuse, vandalism, or force majeure.
Quoted scope takes precedence over drawings in the event of discrepancies.
payment_terms: Purchase Order and signed quotation are required for order confirmation.
30% payment within 30 days from invoice date.
draft_patch.notes:
Venue: EWB Grand Hall
Date / Duration: 26th June 2024
Attendance: 400

items.description: Rental, supply and fix of the following for platform:
Platform: Fabricate side wooden skirting with LED strip lights. Size: 80Rm x 80cmH
Platform: Supply and fix of carpet flooring (including wastage)
Platform: Fabricate and install wooden steps. Size: 1mW x 2mL
Fabricate, supply and install tiered platform for students with 20cmH to 1.0mH x 168sqm (24m*7m) x 2 sets
Fabricate, supply and install tiered platform for VIP/ Alumni with 20cmH to 60cmH x
Backdrop: 126sqm (21m*6) x 1 set Fabricate, supply and install side frame for LED screens in MDF with emulsion paint finish. Size: 42sqm
Backdrop: Rental supply and installation of stage deck platform with fabricated wooden platform. Size: 80mL*10mD
Backdrop: Fabricate, supply and install side wings in MDF with emulsion paint finish. Size: 4mH x 5mL
Backdrop: Hire of scaffold systems for backsupport including counter weights
Fabricate, supply and install podium with logo graphics.
Rental supply and installation of P3.9 LED Screens on sides. Size: 38sqm each
Led Screens: ETC Source 4 Profiles
Lighting System: Robe Pointes
Lighting System: Robe Spiders
Lighting System: Wall Washers
Lighting System: Lighting Console
Lighting System: Rental supply and installation of P3.9 LED Screens on center. Size: 5mH*20mL
Lighting System: Supply and fix lighted cut-out signage with flex insert
Lighting System: Truss systems for installation of lights and sound system
Lighting System: Chain motors for installation of truss
Lighting System: Sparklers
Lighting System: Rental supply of
Lighting System: Hire of technicians for installation, event day, dismantling
Lighting System: LED globe (1.5mtr dia) to display logo at the entrance lobby
Stage Effects: Self standing p2 LED display posters for display of highlights or directional signages
Truss Systems: Washlights for the Holding area of the VVIP
Technicians: Sound Lights Fabricate, supply and install photo backdrop feature with with LED lighting as per design. Size: 6mW x 3mH
Technicians: Fabricate, supply and install timeline wall feature with with LED lighting as per design. Size: 6mW x 3mH (note: client to provide content for timeline)
Technicians: Rental supply of sofas for VIPs
Rental supply of round coffee tables for VIPs
Supply of floral arrangement for each coffee table
Nexo Line Array Speakers
Subwoofer
Podium Mics
Wireless Mics
Pre & Post-Event Working Power. Client to provide electrical power supply (380V, 3-phase; 24-hrs) on site for
setup, operation and dismantling works DESIGN & PROJECT MANAGEMENT
360 Degree Cameras: Event concept and design, 3D visualisation, rendering and detailing for construction
Red Carpet For The Vvip Entrance Into The Main Hall 40 Sqm: Coordination of all logistics, pre-event and for on site installation and dismantling
Red Carpet For The Vvip Entrance Into The Main Hall 40 Sqm: Provision for site supervisor, safety officer and site coordinator to be onsite for installation,
Provision For Skilled Personnel For Installation And Dismantling 30 Pax: event duration and dismantling. Provision for Project Manager and show caller to be onsite as and when required
Provision For Skilled Personnel For Installation And Dismantling 30 Pax: Project management and contractors' insurance
Provision For Skilled Personnel For Installation And Dismantling 30 Pax: Archival film footage, photos and other relevant material for the production of the multimedia video
